summary: Iteration 207: Scadenziario Manutenzioni Unificato + Verbali ITT - All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: both new pages load correctly with KPI cards, tables, forms, and sidebar navigation working.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/scadenziario-manutenzioni correctly aggregates instruments (no user_id filter) + attrezzature + verbali_itt with KPI and urgenza calculation
Scadenziario shows 4 items: 2 instruments (Cesoia Idraulica, Calibro Digitale) + 2 ITTs (taglio_termico, foratura), 0 attrezzature
POST /api/verbali-itt validates processo against PROCESSI_ITT list, creates with prove array and esito_globale
GET /api/verbali-itt returns verbali with calculated scaduto/in_scadenza/giorni_rimasti status fields
GET /api/verbali-itt/check-validita returns processi_qualificati/scaduti for Riesame Tecnico integration
POST /api/verbali-itt/{itt_id}/firma adds digital signature with nome/ruolo/data
GET /api/verbali-itt/{itt_id}/pdf generates WeasyPrint PDF with company logo, prove table, esito, firma
GET /api/riesame/{commessa_id} now has 12 checks (was 11), new check 'itt_processi_qualificati' in Produzione section
ITT check verifies taglio_termico, taglio_meccanico, foratura are qualified - shows 'Processi mancanti: taglio meccanico' since only 2/3 are qualified
Frontend ScadenziarioManutenzioniPage shows unified table with fonte icons (strumento/attrezzatura/itt), urgenza badges, impatto badges
Frontend VerbaliITTPage shows CRUD form with processo select, prove management, esito checkbox, PDF download, delete buttons
Sidebar DashboardLayout has 'Scadenziario Manutenzioni' and 'Verbali ITT' under Certificazioni group

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements working, navigation, forms, tables, KPI cards)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test ITTs and instruments.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 207 verified the new Scadenziario Manutenzioni Unificato and Verbali ITT features. Key endpoints: GET /api/scadenziario-manutenzioni (aggregates instruments + attrezzature + ITT with KPI), POST/GET/DELETE /api/verbali-itt (CRUD), POST /api/verbali-itt/{id}/firma (signature), GET /api/verbali-itt/{id}/pdf (WeasyPrint PDF), GET /api/verbali-itt/check-validita (process status), GET /api/riesame/{commessa_id} (now 12 checks with itt_processi_qualificati). Frontend pages: /manutenzioni (ScadenziarioManutenzioniPage.js), /verbali-itt (VerbaliITTPage.js). Sidebar links under Certificazioni group. The 'filo conduttore' philosophy is implemented - ITT data appears in both Scadenziario and Riesame Tecnico.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/scadenziario-manutenzioni: PASS - Returns 4 items (2 instruments + 2 ITTs), KPI with totale/scaduti/in_scadenza/prossimi_90gg/conformi
backend_endpoints.POST /api/verbali-itt: PASS - Creates verbale with processo validation, prove array, esito_globale
backend_endpoints.GET /api/verbali-itt: PASS - Lists verbali with scaduto/in_scadenza/giorni_rimasti calculated
backend_endpoints.DELETE /api/verbali-itt/{itt_id}: PASS - Deletes verbale, returns 404 for nonexistent
backend_endpoints.POST /api/verbali-itt/{itt_id}/firma: PASS - Adds signature, validates nome required
backend_endpoints.GET /api/verbali-itt/{itt_id}/pdf: PASS - Returns valid PDF (>5KB), 404 for nonexistent

scadenziario_manutenzioni_page.kpi_cards: 4 cards: Totale(4), Scaduti(0), In Scadenza(0), Conformi(4)
scadenziario_manutenzioni_page.table_rows: 4 items with fonte icons, urgenza badges, impatto badges

verbali_itt_page.kpi_cards: 4 cards: Totale(2), Validi(2), Scaduti(0), Processi Coperti(2/6)
verbali_itt_page.filo_conduttore_alert: VISIBLE - 'Filo Conduttore: Riesame Tecnico' info card
verbali_itt_page.form_fields: processo select, macchina, materiale, spessore, data_prova, data_scadenza, prove, esito, note
